title: Scene-Aware Humanoid Locomotion: Generative Control for Dynamic Environments
description: Current state-of-the-art humanoids excel at specific, hard-coded tasks but often fail in the "wild"—specifically when navigating spaces shared with humans. The goal of this project is to develop a generalized locomotion policy that is both agile and safe. We will explore the intersection of Reinforcement Learning and Generative models to create a humanoid agent capable of perceiving its surroundings and adapting its gait to avoid collisions, ensuring safe interaction in human-populated environments.
